schema.system: name of the system under test
schema.perDimension: mean of each of the 6 narrative dimensions
schema.judgeModel: the judge model used (materially affects scores — required)
schema.scoredAt: ISO date the submitter ran the benchmark

results.note: Reference baseline shipped with the repo. SYN-003 carries a deliberate seeded fabrication, so a 33% dangerous-fab rate is expected — it demonstrates the judge firing, not a system failure.
